environment_setup.filesystem_state: Apache Spark cluster master node is briefly unresponsive while negotiating resources.

evaluation_loop.condition: Submit the massive data transformation job to the remote Spark cluster.

injected_failure_state.observation: WARN StandaloneAppClient$ClientEndpoint: Failed to connect to master spark://cluster-master:7077. Retrying...

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent reads the connection failure to the Spark master and issues the exact same spark-submit command again.
